rulings.Case Title: IN RE: MICHAEL COOMBS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Reconsider The Court'S Jun 9, 14 "Order Re: Receiver'S Mtn For Writ Of Possession";
rulings.Rulings: PETITIONERs MICHAEL COOMBS and TAMARA WOODS' Motion To Reconsider The Court's Jun 9, 2014 "Order Re: Receiver's Motion For Writ Of Possession" Continued to August 15, 2014 to be heard by the honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay. = (501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: MOHSIN AHMMED VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 21, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANT CHICAGO TITLE COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained without leave to amend. Causes of action based on fraud are barred by the 3-year statute of limitations. Plaintiff fails to allege facts in support of tolling and/or CTC's participation in any conspiracy as late as 2011. 3rd, 5th, 6th, 7th and 8th causes of action are not supported by facts sufficient to allege these causes of action. = (501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: MOHSIN AHMMED VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-11-516690 WITH CASE CGC-12-517422
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 21, 2014, line 2. PLAINTIFF MOHSIN AHMMED's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-11-516690 WITH CASE CGC-12-517422 DENIED. These cases involve different parties, different questions of law and fact. Consolidating the matters will be prejudicial and will cause delay in the limited jurisdiction case 516690. = (501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS LAUDERBACH VS. KATHRYN KAIN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 21, 2014, line 7. DEFENDANT KATHRYN KAIN's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend to properly verify the complaint (DeCamp v. Kensington (1978) 83 Cal.App.3d 268) and to correct typographical errors/check proper boxes on the form complaint. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Defendant and defendant's counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. = (501/LKS) - LATE TENTATIVE

rulings.Case Title: 300 BUCHANAN C1, LLC VS. NICOLE MOSKOWITZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Summons
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 21, 2014, line 8. DEFENDANT NICOLE MOSKOWITZ's Motion To Quash Summons DENIED, 5 days to respond. Complaint sufficiently alleges service of the operative notice and summons form is not defective. = (501/LKS) - LATE TENTATIVE
